parsed_review.summary: CP00-665 is a descriptor-only RP21 Admin Console review/evidence closeout bridge slice over 28 planned units (RP21.P09.M07.S13-RP21.P09.M10.S04). Read/Grep/Glob inspection confirms: (1) Metadata consistency - pack_id, risk_class C, unit_count 28, range, deliverable_distribution {claude_review:7, implementation:11, security_audit:6, test:2, ui:2} and micro_title distribution {Test And Golden Case Set:8, Hermes Evidence Packet:8, Claude Review Packet:8, Closeout And Next Handoff:4} agree across manifest, registry ADMIN_CONSOLE_CP665_PACK_BINDING/REQUIREMENTS, baseline, plan live_state, and next-pack-queue (live_latest_pack_id CP00-665). (2) No overclaim - manifest production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, status in_progress, gate_outcome pending_pack_level_review; construction-inspection verdict PENDING_REVIEW; adjudication pending; no production_ready=true / runtime_opened=true / enterprise_trust=true / hermes_runtime_opened=true anywhere in the CP665 contract surface. The production_ready_flag is a gate name, shown false in inspection. (3) Descriptor-only / no-write / no-real-data boundaries held - registry authority_boundaries and CP645-rooted no_write_attestation set all runtime/mutation/permission/audit/persistence flags false and promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false, claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation=false; descriptor runtime_boundary and review_evidence_closeout_bridge_contract flags (persists_review_packet, emits_hermes_runtime_receipt, emits_audit_event, evaluates_runtime_permission, writes_permission_decision, etc.) all false; command-evidence writes_product_state=false, no_real_data=true. (4) Hermes confined to deterministic evidence packet/receipt - hermes_evidence packet hermes_runtime_opened=false, runtime_receipt_emitted=false; command-evidence hermes_gate pre_review_passed with empty command_ids. (5) Claude remains read-only non-approver - review-request read_only with tools Read,Grep,Glob; claude_review_plan read_only=true; claude review packet blocks_pack_on_p0_p1_p2 gating only, not final approval. (6) Review hardening present - forbidden_review_evidence covers not_logged_in/malformed_json/quota_failure/permission_denied/tool_call_only_output, and readiness auth_preflight passed (exit 0, 1458-byte valid result JSON). Tests in packages/admin/test/model.test.js assert coverage, descriptor-only runtime boundaries, no_write_attestation, read-only/blocking Claude packet, and handoff to CP00-666 / RP22.P00.M00.S01; validator script and contract projection deep-equality checks align. No P0/P1/P2 defects found; one P3 informational note on the evidentiary basis (recorded vs independently re-executed commands). Verdict PASS_WITH_FINDINGS; does not block pack or this-CP goal closeout. Final human/enterprise-trust approval remains outside this receipt as expected and does not block.

findings.title: Validation/test exit codes are recorded evidence, not independently re-executed under read-only review
findings.details: command-evidence.json records exit_code 0 for the full validation matrix (npm test, npm run validate, closeout-pack-plan:validate, closeout-pack:validate, rp21:admin-console:validate, node --test model.test.js, weighted/spec/fullplan/goal:closeout/rp00:control-plane validators, git diff --check, npm run build). Under the read-only review constraint (Read/Grep/Glob, no Bash) these exit codes were not independently re-executed. This verdict therefore rests on static inspection of implementation, validators, descriptors, and tests - which are internally consistent and assert the descriptor-only/no-write/no-real-data boundaries - plus the recorded command evidence and the passed readiness auth_preflight. This is the standard evidentiary basis for the hardened read-only review, not a defect in the pack.
findings.recommendation: Continue to rely on the pre-review validation runner plus Hermes/CI gates to execute and capture the command matrix before production_ready promotion; no code or descriptor change required for CP00-665.
findings.post_review_disposition: Accepted as an inherent limitation of the read-only review model; non-blocking. Pack metadata, descriptor-only boundaries, no_write_attestation, Hermes/Claude packet handling, and handoff target independently verified by source inspection.
